title: Zoom integration to post update in zoom channel when based on changes on board
excerpt: Current zoom integrations are only related to meetings. I want ability to post updates on zoom channels based on activity on board (similar to SLACK integration)

posts.author: MACMonday (Meena Barve)
posts.cookedHtml: Current zoom integrations are only related to meetings. I want ability to post updates on zoom channels based on activity on board (similar to SLACK integration)
